title: Fast Retailing shares soar to record high after the Uniqlo owner lifts profit forecast
summary_full: Shares of Fast Retailing surged over 9% to a record high on Friday after the Japanese parent of Uniqlo lifted its full-year outlook.
summary_public: Shares of Fast Retailing surged over 9% to a record high on Friday after the Japanese parent of Uniqlo lifted its full-year outlook.
